title: Intense Aromatic Middle Eastern Beef Ouzi
description: A rich and flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring beef stock cubes and a mother-sauce-base, macrobiotic-friendly and quick to fix, served in the form of ouzi.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the ground beef and cook until it is browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the beef stock cubes, mother sauce base, salt, black pepper, and sumac to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the mixture is simmering, toast the pita bread in the oven for 5 minutes.
To assemble the ouzi, place a piece of toasted pita bread on a plate, then spoon the beef mixture over the top.
Serve the ouzi hot, garnished with additional sumac if desired.
